name: Ridgeline Minerals Corp.
description: Ridgeline Minerals Corp. is a discovery-focused precious and base metal explorer with a 201 km² portfolio of five projects in Nevada, USA, advancing both 100%-owned assets and earn-in exploration agreements with major mining partners. The company has secured three earn-in agreements totalling $60 million, including partnerships with South32 on the Selena copper-gold project and Nevada Gold Mines (Barrick/Newmont JV) on the Swift project. Ridgeline targets Carlin-type gold, porphyry copper-gold, and carbonate replacement deposit styles across Nevada and Idaho.
